languages.text: Лорный барк 7 (трибуна.. как на корабле РТ, но заметно пожиже)

languages.text: Место, с которого капитан обращается к офицерам. Намного скромнее, чем на судне Вольного Торговца.
The seat from which the captain addresses the officers — far more modest than its counterpart of the Rogue Trader's vessel.

languages.text: Der Sessel, auf dem der Kapitän seine Offiziere befehligt ... wesentlich bescheidener als sein Pendant auf dem Schiff {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}.
languages.original_text: The seat from which the captain addresses the officers — far more modest than its counterpart of the Rogue Trader's vessel.

traits.locale_text: Der Sessel, auf dem der Kapitän seine Offiziere befehligt ... wesentlich bescheidener als sein Pendant auf dem Schiff {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}.

languages.text: Le fauteuil d'où le capitaine s'adresse à ses officiers est bien plus modeste que celui du vaisseau {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}.
languages.original_text: The seat from which the captain addresses the officers — far more modest than its counterpart of the Rogue Trader's vessel.

traits.locale_text: Le fauteuil d'où le capitaine s'adresse à ses officiers est bien plus modeste que celui du vaisseau {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}.

languages.text: El asiento desde donde el capitán se dirige a sus oficiales, mucho más modesto que su contrapartida en el navío {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente.
languages.original_text: The seat from which the captain addresses the officers — far more modest than its counterpart of the Rogue Trader's vessel.

traits.locale_text: El asiento desde donde el capitán se dirige a sus oficiales, mucho más modesto que su contrapartida en el navío {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente.

languages.text: 这艘舰船的舰长就是坐在这个座位上，向众多军官发号施令的。不过与行商浪人的宝座相比，这个座位要逊色不少。
languages.original_text: The seat from which the captain addresses the officers — far more modest than its counterpart of the Rogue Trader's vessel.

traits.locale_text: 这艘舰船的舰长就是坐在这个座位上，向众多军官发号施令的。不过与行商浪人的宝座相比，这个座位要逊色不少。

languages.text: キャプテンが士官たちに指示を出すための座席。自由開拓者の船のものと比べると、はるかに質素である。
languages.original_text: The seat from which the captain addresses the officers — far more modest than its counterpart of the Rogue Trader's vessel.

traits.locale_text: キャプテンが士官たちに指示を出すための座席。自由開拓者の船のものと比べると、はるかに質素である。

languages.text: Kaptanın subaylara seslenirken oturduğu koltuk. Hür Tacir'in gemisindeki muadilinden çok daha mütevazı.
languages.original_text: The seat from which the captain addresses the officers — far more modest than its counterpart of the Rogue Trader's vessel.
